things.name: King Richard III Visitor Centre
things.description: World-class museum built over the car park where Richard III's skeleton was found in 2012; tells the story of his life, death and extraordinary rediscovery

things.name: Leicester Cathedral
things.description: Medieval cathedral housing the newly interred tomb of King Richard III, who died at Bosworth Field in 1485; the final resting place of England's last Plantagenet king

things.name: National Space Centre
things.description: UK's largest space attraction with six interactive galleries, real rockets, a planetarium and exhibits on the history of space exploration

things.name: New Walk Museum and Art Gallery
things.description: Free museum on Leicester's beautiful Georgian pedestrian boulevard with collections of Ancient Egyptian artefacts, Dinosaur Gallery and Picasso ceramics

things.name: Leicester Market
things.description: Europe's largest open-air covered market dating from the 13th century; a vibrant multicultural bazaar reflecting Leicester's remarkable diversity

things.name: Jewry Wall Museum
things.description: One of Britain's largest surviving Roman structures; the 2nd-century Jewry Wall stands 9 metres tall beside a museum of Roman Ratae Corieltauvorum

things.name: Golden Mile (Belgrave Road)
things.description: Leicester's vibrant South Asian quarter with over 100 Indian restaurants, sweet shops and textile stores; the heart of one of England's most celebrated curry scenes

things.name: Bosworth Battlefield Heritage Centre
things.description: Site of the 1485 Battle of Bosworth where Richard III fell; an interactive heritage centre interpreting this pivotal moment in English history

things.name: Bradgate Park
things.description: Ancient deer park of 850 acres north of Leicester with the ruins of Bradgate House, birthplace of Lady Jane Grey, and a herd of free-roaming red deer

things.name: King Power Stadium
things.description: Home of Leicester City with 32,261 capacity; the Foxes' miraculous 2015-16 Premier League title led to a Champions League quarter-final run in 2016-17
